Description: The default/public ACR Task pool is Azure-managed compute and is not inside the customer VNet.
Impact_or_Rationale: May raise security boundary concerns if used for sensitive or internal builds.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Limit public/default pool usage to bootstrap or non-sensitive build activities. Use dedicated private ACR agent pool for internalized builds requiring private network access.

Description: If the security gate is not strict enough, vulnerable images could still progress to nonprod or production.
Impact_or_Rationale: Could weaken production security posture and create compliance exposure.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Define Trivy severity thresholds, fail conditions, exception handling, and POA&M requirements before promotion.

Description: Trivy and JFrog Xray may identify different findings. Relying on one scanner may create blind spots.
Impact_or_Rationale: Security findings may be missed if only one scanner is treated as authoritative.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Treat the new CI/CD gate as additive, not a replacement for existing Xray controls. Compare scanner results during rollout.

Description: If GitHub Actions, ACR Tasks, AKS, or ACR is unavailable, image builds or promotions may be delayed.
Impact_or_Rationale: Routine maintenance or emergency patching may be delayed.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Document retry process, manual break-glass process, and dependency ownership.

Description: If nonprod validation is incomplete, an image may be promoted before all runner groups are tested.
Impact_or_Rationale: Production runner groups may fail after promotion.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Require runs-on validation across all required runner groups before promotion gate approval.

Description: Automatically generated POA&M entries may lack enough context for security review or audit use.
Impact_or_Rationale: Findings may require manual rework before they are useful for compliance tracking.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Define required POA&M fields, ownership, severity mapping, evidence links, and review process.

Description: Current process builds images separately by environment.
Impact_or_Rationale: Creates inconsistency between nonprod and prod and duplicates work.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Implement build once, validate in nonprod, promote to prod model.

Description: Approved routine maintenance still requires someone to log in at night and manually click a workflow.
Impact_or_Rationale: Creates avoidable operational burden and manual execution risk.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Replace manual execution with scheduled workflow and gated promotion.

Item: Review board overhead for routine maintenance
Description: Basic runner image maintenance requires security review board approval each time.
Impact_or_Rationale: Slows response to normal patching and routine maintenance needs.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Establish a pre-approved automated process with evidence-based gates and defined exception handling.

Description: JFrog Xray may block future pulls, but the image build can continue after an image was already pulled.
Impact_or_Rationale: Creates a CI/CD enforcement gap where vulnerable images may continue through the build process.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Add Trivy-based CI/CD security gate that evaluates the built artifact before promotion.

Description: Current manual process makes it harder to consistently capture who approved, what was built, what was scanned, and what was deployed.
Impact_or_Rationale: Creates compliance and audit evidence gaps.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Capture commit SHA, image digest, scan result, SBOM, POA&M output, approvals, deployment status, and release metadata.

Description: Security team must review and approve scan thresholds, fail criteria, exception handling, and POA&M output.
Impact_or_Rationale: Pipeline cannot become the approved control without security agreement.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Schedule security review and document approved gate policy.

Description: Security/platform team must review the use of public/default ACR Task pool for bootstrap and private ACR agent pool for internal builds.
Impact_or_Rationale: Architecture approval is needed because the public/default pool is not inside the customer VNet.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Present boundary diagram and document allowed use cases for each agent pool.
Owner: Security Team / Platform Team / My Team

Description: GitHub OIDC federation and Azure RBAC permissions must be configured for ACR, AKS, and deployment actions.
Impact_or_Rationale: Pipeline requires passwordless cloud authentication and scoped authorization.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Create federated credential and assign least-privilege RBAC roles.

Description: Dedicated ACR agent pool must be attached to the correct VNet/subnet and allowed to reach internal JFrog, internal CA, ACR, and required services.
Impact_or_Rationale: Internalized image builds depend on private network access.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Validate routing, DNS, firewall rules, private endpoints, and required egress paths.
Owner: Network Team / Platform Team / My Team

Description: Repository dispatch workflow must exist and accept image version tags for Terraform/Helm deployment.
Impact_or_Rationale: Image promotion depends on automated downstream deployment.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Implement dispatch payload contract and downstream workflow.

Description: Nonprod and prod runner groups must have validation workflows that confirm the new images can pick up jobs successfully.
Impact_or_Rationale: Promotion depends on proving runner groups function correctly.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Create runs-on validation workflows for all required runner groups.

Description: Build logs, SBOMs, scan reports, POA&M artifacts, and release metadata need an approved storage and retention location.
Impact_or_Rationale: Auditability depends on retained and retrievable evidence.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Define approved evidence repository, retention period, and access control.

Description: Move from per-environment image builds to build once, validate, and promote.
Impact_or_Rationale: Improves consistency, traceability, and operational efficiency.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Approve nonprod-to-prod image promotion model.

Description: Determine what severity levels block promotion and what requires POA&M or exception handling.
Impact_or_Rationale: Defines how the pipeline enforces security policy.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Approve Trivy/security gate policy.

Description: Decide whether the default/public ACR Task pool is acceptable for bootstrap builds only.
Impact_or_Rationale: The public/default pool is Azure-managed and not inside the customer VNet.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Approve limited use of public/default pool for non-sensitive bootstrap stage.
Owner: Security Team / Platform Team / Voting Members

Description: Use dedicated private ACR agent pool for internalized builds that require internal CA, JFrog mirror, and private configuration.
Impact_or_Rationale: Keeps sensitive build stages in the customer-controlled private network path.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Approve private ACR agent pool as required for sensitive/internal build stages.
Owner: Security Team / Platform Team / Voting Members

Description: Determine what event marks an image as production approved.
Impact_or_Rationale: Clarifies whether approval is tied to promotion gate approval, prod validation success, or GitHub release creation.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Define official release approval point.

Description: Determine whether generated POA&M artifacts are stored as pipeline evidence initially or integrated directly into a formal GRC process.
Impact_or_Rationale: Determines how findings are tracked and reviewed.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Approve initial POA&M handling approach.

Description: Initial POA&M entries may be generated as files/artifacts rather than integrated directly into a GRC platform.
Impact_or_Rationale: Manual review/import may still be required.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Deliver immediate visibility while allowing later GRC integration.

Description: The first implementation may use Trivy as the primary pipeline gate while JFrog Xray remains separate.
Impact_or_Rationale: Multiple scanners are not yet fully normalized into one policy engine.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Provide immediate CI/CD enforcement while preserving future scanner correlation work.

Description: Promotion may initially require manual approval in GitHub rather than full integration with change management tooling.
Impact_or_Rationale: Approval evidence may live in GitHub instead of the enterprise change system.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Enable controlled rollout while formal change integration is defined.

Description: Exceptions may initially be documented in POA&M artifacts or review comments rather than a fully automated risk acceptance workflow.
Impact_or_Rationale: Exception lifecycle may require manual follow-up.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Launch the security gate without waiting for full risk workflow automation.

Item: Bootstrap build on public/default ACR pool
Description: Bootstrap build may use Azure-managed default/public ACR Task compute outside the customer VNet.
Impact_or_Rationale: It is not fully private-network-contained.
Mitigation_or_Next_Step: Use only for low-sensitivity bootstrap build to reduce complexity; internalized builds use private agent pool.
